nasb.text: But when I say to the wicked, ‘You will surely die,’ and he turns from his sin and practices justice and righteousness,

esv.text: Again, though I say to the wicked, ‘You shall surely die,’ yet if he turns from his sin and does what is just and right,

cnv.text: 我雖然對惡人說：‘你必定死亡’，但是他若離開他的罪，行公平和正直的事，

ccb.text: 我虽对恶人说他必定要死，但他若改邪归正，行事公正仁义，
